legacy.content:
# Phase 20-01 Summary
## Status
Completed.
## Delivered
1. Phase 20 is now active in roadmap/task/state docs with JSONL stream-ledger scope. 2. LLM turn chooser backlog item is explicitly de-scoped (`20-5` dropped). 3. New task `20-6` added for JSONL event-row streaming and low-memory viewer iteration. 4. Core planning/design docs now explicitly state: - MCP support exists, - deterministic runner is baseline, - autonomous LLM gameplay is not implemented, - future prerequisites are documented. 5. User-facing docs (`README`, `packages/engine-mcp/README`, PRD integration policy) were aligned to the same scope.
## Notes
- This summary captures policy and planning realignment only. - Implementation work for stream-ledger output and viewer iteration continues in `20-02`.
